title: Fixed currency column
excerpt:
I really want to have the column that show the currency of any countries. 
Then I don’t need to change the number in my formula anytime currency has changed.

posts.author: Rran (Ahran Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I really want to have the column that show the currency of any countries.
